ticket.subject: Cannot login after password reset
ticket.description: I have been unable to login since yesterday morning after being forced to reset my password. The reset email arrived but entering the new password gives an invalid credentials error.

ticket.subject: Invoice shows wrong amount for March
ticket.description: My invoice for March shows a charge of $299 but I am on the $199 plan. Please review and issue a corrected invoice or refund the difference to my payment method.

ticket.subject: App crashes on startup after latest update
ticket.description: The mobile app crashes immediately on launch after the latest update. It worked fine on version 3.1.2. Device is iPhone 15 running iOS 17.4. No crash log is generated.

ticket.subject: Two-factor authentication codes rejected
ticket.description: My 2FA codes from the authenticator app are always rejected. I have tried regenerating the secret three times and syncing my phone clock but the issue persists on every device.

ticket.subject: Feature request: dark mode support
ticket.description: It would be great to have a dark mode option in the settings. Many users in our organisation work in low-light environments and would benefit from reduced screen brightness.

ticket.subject: Payment declined despite valid card
ticket.description: My credit card payment keeps failing with error code CARD_DECLINED even though my bank confirms there are no blocks on the card and sufficient funds are available.

ticket.subject: Production outage: all API calls returning 503
ticket.description: Our entire production environment is down. All API calls return 503 Service Unavailable. This is causing significant revenue loss and needs immediate escalation and remediation.

ticket.subject: Refund not processed after 15 days
ticket.description: I was promised a refund on 15 April and it has now been 15 days with no credit to my account. Order reference RF-2026-0415. Please expedite this.

ticket.subject: Bug: notifications sent to wrong user
ticket.description: My colleague received email notifications for tickets assigned to me. Steps to reproduce: assign any ticket to user A and observe notification arrives to user B. This is a privacy issue.

ticket.subject: Critical security vulnerability: ticket ID enumeration
ticket.description: I discovered that it is possible to view other users tickets by incrementing the ticket ID in the URL. This is a critical security vulnerability that exposes customer data.

ticket.subject: Account locked after failed login attempts
ticket.description: My account got locked after several failed login attempts. I know my password is correct. Please unlock the account and explain the lockout policy including threshold and duration.

ticket.subject: Dashboard takes 30 seconds to load since Tuesday
ticket.description: The main dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load since the Tuesday deployment. All other pages load normally. This is blocking our entire team from their daily work.

ticket.subject: Feature request: webhook support
ticket.description: Please add webhook support so we can receive real-time events when tickets are created updated or resolved. This is essential for our workflow automation pipeline.

ticket.subject: Subscription auto-renewed without notice
ticket.description: My annual subscription was auto-renewed and I was charged $1200 without any renewal reminder email. I would like to cancel and request a full refund under your 30-day money-back guarantee.

ticket.subject: API key stopped working — production integrations broken
ticket.description: My API key stopped working two days ago. I have regenerated it three times but every call returns 401 Unauthorized. Our production integrations are completely broken.

ticket.subject: Feature request: audit log for ISO 27001 compliance
ticket.description: We need a detailed audit log showing who changed what and when. This is a hard requirement for our ISO 27001 certification renewal in Q3. The log must be exportable as CSV.

ticket.subject: GDPR Article 17 data deletion request
ticket.description: Under GDPR Article 17 I am formally requesting the deletion of all personal data associated with my account within 30 days. Please confirm receipt and provide a written timeline.

ticket.subject: Bug: date filter returns results outside selected range
ticket.description: When I set a custom date range the results include tickets outside that range. Reproduction: go to tickets list, set date from 2026-01-01 to 2026-01-31, observe February tickets appear.

ticket.subject: Duplicate charge of $149 on my account
ticket.description: I see two identical charges of $149 on my account statement dated 2026-04-01. I only have one active subscription. Please investigate and refund the duplicate charge immediately.

ticket.subject: Request: SLA tracking and breach alerts
ticket.description: We need SLA tracking so we can see which tickets have breached their response time targets and receive proactive alerts before a breach occurs. Essential for our support team KPIs.

ticket.subject: SSO configuration failing with signature error
ticket.description: We are trying to set up SAML SSO with our identity provider but keep getting a signature verification error. Our IdP metadata is correctly uploaded and the certificates match.

ticket.subject: Incorrect VAT rate on invoices
ticket.description: The system is calculating 20% VAT on my invoices but I am in a region where the correct rate is 5%. My account country is set correctly to the right jurisdiction.

ticket.subject: Data export only returns partial results
ticket.description: The data export I ran yesterday contains only 1200 records but our account has over 5000 tickets. The export finished without any error message. Expected behaviour: full export.

ticket.subject: Session expires after 5 minutes of inactivity
ticket.description: My session expires after about 5 minutes of inactivity even though I have not changed any timeout settings. This is very disruptive during long form fills and report generation.

ticket.subject: Payment gateway timeout at checkout
ticket.description: Every attempt to pay shows the error Gateway timeout GW-504 at the final checkout step. I have tried three different cards from two different banks. The issue is consistent.

ticket.subject: Email notifications stopped arriving
ticket.description: I stopped receiving email notifications for ticket updates about a week ago. My email address is correct in settings, I have checked spam folders, and all my other email is working fine.

ticket.subject: Cannot change account email address
ticket.description: The change email form accepts my new address and shows a success message but my account still shows the old email address after refreshing. The change is not being persisted.

ticket.subject: Feature request: multi-language support
ticket.description: Our customers are based in Spain and France. We would love the interface to support Spanish and French in addition to English. This would significantly reduce our support volume.

ticket.subject: Discount code not applied at checkout
ticket.description: I entered promo code SAVE20 at checkout but the 20% discount was not applied and I was charged the full amount. The code was shown as valid before I completed the order.

ticket.subject: Renewal price higher than quoted price
ticket.description: When I renewed my subscription I was charged $299/month but the price shown during the renewal flow was $249/month. I have a screenshot of the quoted price. Please honour it.
